id.description: Unique identifier of the settlement instance

created_at.description: The timestamp when the settlement was created (milliseconds since the Unix epoch)

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last update of the settlement (milliseconds since the Unix epoch)

failed_at.description: Timestamp (in milliseconds since the Unix epoch) when the settlement or settlement instruction failed. Present only if the status is `failed`.

completed_at.description: Timestamp of when the settlement was completed (if applicable)

currency.description: The currency supported by custodian and exchange

amount.description:
• Positive value means that since the previous settlement, the client has earned/bought the asset in the exchange and settlement direction is from exchange to the client.
  • Negative value means, since the previous settlement, the client has lost/sold the asset in the exchange and settlement direction is from client to deribit.

custody_balance.description: Custody balance of the user at the time of initiating the settlement

total_equity.description: Total equity of the client between all main and sub accounts, at the time of initialising the settlement.

status.description: The status of settlement instruction. Default is `pending_review`.

settlement_id.description: The id of the settlement instance

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the instruction was created (milliseconds since the Unix epoch)

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last update of the instruction (milliseconds since the Unix epoch)

failed_at.description: Timestamp (in milliseconds since the Unix epoch) when the settlement or settlement instruction failed. Present only if the status is `failed`.

reviewed_at.description: Timestamp (in milliseconds since the Unix epoch) when the custodian reviewed the settlement instruction. Present only after a review action has been taken.

completed_at.description: Timestamp (in milliseconds since the Unix epoch) when the settlement or settlement instruction was completed. Only present if the status is `completed`.

review_reason.description: Optional reason provided by the custodian when rejecting or ignoring a settlement instruction.

review_result.description: Outcome of the custodian's review. Present only after the review has been completed. Values match the `action` taken: `confirm`, `ignore`, or `reject`.

note.description: Additional note related to the settlement
